# GlobalPlacement making strong progress: overflow dropped from 0.975 to 0.154 in ~25 min.
# Timing-driven reweighting now active - good sign. Continue monitoring.
sleep 600
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/ 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -5
